name: Fatal Attraction

topRankStats: Enemies within 20m are drawn to you. Once they are within 6m, they detonate for 250 Damage. Kill them before detonation to increase lure time and reduce cooldown.
levelStats: Enemies within 10m are drawn to you. Once they are within 3.5m, they detonate for 100 Damage. Kill them before detonation to increase lure time and reduce cooldown.

Enemies within 16m are drawn to you. Once they are within 5m, they detonate for 180 Damage. Kill them before detonation to increase lure time and reduce cooldown.
Enemies within 18m are drawn to you. Once they are within 5.5m, they detonate for 200 Damage. Kill them before detonation to increase lure time and reduce cooldown.
Enemies within 20m are drawn to you. Once they are within 6m, they detonate for 250 Damage. Kill them before detonation to increase lure time and reduce cooldown.
